productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Printed Pink Top
description: Style Notegirls will love this top from gini and jony. Team it with a skirt and sandals for that uber cool and comfy look.Product DetailsBubble gum pink round neck top, has short puffed-sleeves, contrast piping on the neckline and sleeve hem, graphic print with glitter on the front and ruching on either sides of the waistMaterial and CareMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery
